  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui.console
  2. ConsoleOutput

Verwendungen von Klasse
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui.console.ConsoleOutput

Packages, die ConsoleOutput verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
Contains configuration models and parsing logic that bind TOML settings to the engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller
Contains the main execution controllers and initialization factories for the Genetic Algorithm framework.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.input.dataReader
Contains the raw readers capable of interpreting text and CSV structure.

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config mit Parametern vom Typ ConsoleOutput
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    GeneticAlgorithm<Character>
    CryptanalysisGAConfig.createGeneticAlgorithm(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
    Creates a fully configured GeneticAlgorithm instance using the parameters and operators defined in this configuration.
    Konstruktoren in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config mit Parametern vom Typ ConsoleOutput
    Modifikator
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    CryptanalysisGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, String cipherText, AppConfig appConfig)
    Creates a configuration for the cryptanalysis GA and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.
     
    KnapsackGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, AppConfig config)
    Creates a knapsack GA configuration and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.
     
    SudokuGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
     
     
    SymRegGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, AppConfig config)
     
     
    TSPGAConfig(AppConfig appConfig, ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
    Creates a TSP GA configuration and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.

    GAController(GAProblem<T> problem, GeneticAlgorithm<T> ga, int populationSize, int maxGenerations, ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
